title: Project Mend’s Patrick W. Berry on leadership: Try to see the good in people
summary: Article profiles Patrick W. Berry, a Syracuse University writing professor and leader at Project Mend, discussing his leadership philosophy centered on creating inclusive spaces and recognizing human potential. While focused on personal leadership values rather than municipal operations, the piece highlights civic engagement and community-oriented leadership relevant to Syracuse's innovation ecosystem.

political_signal.description: Article promotes inclusive leadership and community engagement values aligned with innovation and equity priorities, though primarily a profile piece rather than policy signal.
